response_constraints: Report only facts established by the selected tool result; do not infer missing values.
Return exactly three bullet points and include the target record ID in every bullet.
Use only the requested operation and do not inspect or affect unrelated records.

stages.purpose: Select fleet_get from adjacent fleet functions and perform only the requested operation.

prompt: Open vehicle fle-200 and report exactly three fields: ID, status, and location. The stable ID is authoritative, so do not search, list other records, check availability, or change anything. Answer in exactly three bullet points—one field per bullet—and include fle-200 in every bullet.
